children.name: With 20 years of culinary experience spanning three Michelin-starred restaurants, Chef Torres brings a philosophy of simplicity and respect for ingredients to every dish at Ember & Oak.
children.characters: With 20 years of culinary experience spanning three Michelin-starred restaurants, Chef Torres brings a philosophy of simplicity and respect for ingredients to every dish at Ember & Oak.

children.name: "The duck breast was cooked to perfection. Every detail, from the amuse-bouche to the petits fours, showed incredible attention to craft."
children.characters: "The duck breast was cooked to perfection. Every detail, from the amuse-bouche to the petits fours, showed incredible attention to craft."

children.name: "An unforgettable anniversary dinner. The wine pairing was exceptional and the wagyu was the best steak I have ever had."
children.characters: "An unforgettable anniversary dinner. The wine pairing was exceptional and the wagyu was the best steak I have ever had."

children.name: "The seasonal tasting menu is a must-try. Chef Torres creates poetry on a plate. We are already planning our next visit."
children.characters: "The seasonal tasting menu is a must-try. Chef Torres creates poetry on a plate. We are already planning our next visit."
